data.description: A devastating strike that can knock a foe unconscious.

At 5th level, you can interfere with an opponent's flow to attempt a stunning strike when making a melee weapon attack. You spend 1 ki point to make the target succeed a Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of your next turn.
When you take damage that would reduce your hit points to 0 or less, you can use your reaction to halve the damage. You must be conscious to do so.
You can use your action to attempt to still your mind, causing you to become immune to being charmed or frightened until the start of your next turn.
Fierce and unyielding, your will is as hard as a diamond. You learn the Diamond Soul technique, which allows you to enhance your defenses or damage enemies with focused spiritual energy.
The path of the Self is focused on self-reliance and independence. Monks who follow this tradition rely on their own training, skills, and intuition.
Ki is the life force and energy that flows through all living things.

Three are of traditions monastic practices common in the Most the monasteries scattered across multiverse. monks practice one tradition exclusively, a few the traditions instruct monk according his her aptitude interest. three traditions on same techniques. diverging rely the basic as student more they, monk grows adept. a need the choose tradition upon

The hand monastic tradition emphasizes defensive combat and the use of chi to enhance one's physical abilities. The traditions include practices such as Chi Flow, which focuses on flowing chi through the body to increase strength and agility, and Chi Shield, which can create a protective barrier around the monk.
